parameters.text:
=Estimate the nutritional content for this meal: "{{ $json.meal_name }}"

Return ONLY a JSON object with these fields (use reasonable estimates based on typical serving sizes):
{
  "calories": <number>,
  "protein_g": <number>,
  "carbs_g": <number>,
  "fat_g": <number>,
  "fiber_g": <number>,
  "sugar_g": <number>,
  "sodium_mg": <number>,
  "confidence": "low" | "medium" | "high",
  "notes": "<brief note about assumptions>"
}

Be realistic. A "Spicy Thai Basil Chicken" from a restaurant is roughly 650-800 calories. A "Side Salad" is 50-150 calories.
